name: Vampire Knight RPG

Okay, so this is for all my other lovelies who've watched vampire knight. (Well, considering you've touched my Code Geass RPG bot, you probably have.) I ALSO HAVE SOMETHING SPECIAL LINED UP FOR YALL WHEN ONE OF MY BOTS REACHES 3K, so please look forward to it!
